mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the unemployment rate below 3.5% signals a tightening labor market, increasing corporate profit margins and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5-day returns in 60%+ of instances where UNRATE declines below 3.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in industrial production (INDPRO) and rising CPI (CPIAUCSL) indicate stagflationary pressures, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls > 2% YoY and CPIAUCSL rises > 0.5% MoM
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are positive in > 50% of instances where INDPRO declines and CPI rises simultaneously.

mechanism_narrative: During monetary tightening cycles (FEDFUNDS > 4.5%), rising CPI (CPIAUCSL) signals persistent inflation, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in > 50% of instances where FEDFUNDS > 4.5% and CPIAUCSL rises.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts (HOUST) indicate strong consumer demand, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days through increased construction sector activity.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5-day returns in 60%+ of instances where HOUST rises.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month rise in CPI (CPIAUCSL) above 2.5% signals inflationary expectations, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as investors price in tighter monetary policy.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in > 50% of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 2.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in real sales (RSAFS) and GDP (GDPC1) indicates robust economic expansion, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days through corporate earnings momentum.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS rises > 1% MoM and GDPC1 rises > 0.5% QoQ
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are negative in > 50% of instances where RSAFS and GDPC1 both rise.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in industrial production (INDPRO) signals supply chain disruptions, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days through reduced corporate output and higher input costs.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in > 50% of instances where INDPRO declines.
